questions.question: Define a circle.
questions.answer: A circle is the set of all points in a plane that are at a fixed distance (radius) from a fixed point (center).

questions.question: What is the radius of a circle?
questions.answer: The radius of a circle is the distance from its center to any point on the circle.

questions.question: What is the diameter of a circle?
questions.answer: The diameter of a circle is twice the radius, i.e., the distance across the circle through its center.

questions.question: Define a chord of a circle.
questions.answer: A chord is a line segment whose endpoints lie on the circle.

questions.question: Define a secant of a circle.
questions.answer: A secant is a line that intersects the circle at two points.

questions.question: Define a tangent to a circle.
questions.answer: A tangent to a circle is a line that touches the circle at exactly one point.

questions.question: State the radius-tangent perpendicularity property.
questions.answer: The radius of a circle drawn to the point of tangency is perpendicular to the tangent.

questions.question: What is the distance from the center to a chord called?
questions.answer: The perpendicular distance from the center of the circle to the chord.

questions.question: Define an arc of a circle.
questions.answer: An arc is a part of the circumference of a circle.

questions.question: Define a sector of a circle.
questions.answer: A sector is the region enclosed by two radii and the arc between them.

questions.question: Define a segment of a circle.
questions.answer: A segment is the region enclosed by a chord and the corresponding arc.

questions.question: What is a concentric circle?
questions.answer: Concentric circles are circles having the same center but different radii.

questions.question: State the circle angle at the center property.
questions.answer: The angle subtended by an arc at the center is twice the angle subtended at any point on the remaining part of the circle.

questions.question: State the angle in a semicircle property.
questions.answer: The angle subtended by a semicircle at any point on the circle is a right angle.

questions.question: State the opposite angles of a cyclic quadrilateral property.
questions.answer: The sum of opposite angles of a cyclic quadrilateral is 180°.

questions.question: Define a minor arc and major arc.
questions.answer: A minor arc is smaller than a semicircle, and a major arc is larger than a semicircle.

questions.question: State the tangent-secant property.
questions.answer: The square of the length of the tangent drawn from an external point equals the product of the lengths of the secant segment and its external part.

questions.question: Define an exterior point of a circle.
questions.answer: A point lying outside the circle is called an exterior point.

questions.question: Define an interior point of a circle.
questions.answer: A point lying inside the circle is called an interior point.

questions.question: State the property of equal chords in a circle.
questions.answer: Equal chords of a circle are equidistant from the center.

questions.question: State the property of a perpendicular from center to a chord.
questions.answer: The perpendicular from the center to a chord bisects the chord.

questions.question: State the property of circles with equal chords.
questions.answer: Chords of equal length in the same circle subtend equal angles at the center.

questions.question: State the property of tangents from an external point.
questions.answer: Tangents drawn from an external point to a circle are equal in length.

questions.question: Define a segment of a circle formed by a chord and an arc.
questions.answer: The region between a chord and its corresponding arc is called a segment of a circle.

questions.question: State the cyclic quadrilateral property related to angles subtended by the same chord.
questions.answer: Angles subtended by the same chord on the same side of the chord are equal.
